languages.text: Нужно пройти осмотр в Сектор Бионика — отсеке, где врачуют и аугментируют элиту корабля. Осмотр проводят двое специалистов, возглавляющих отсек.

traits.locale_text: Врачеванием бренной плоти занимается вивисектор Джейс Мартинакс. Стоит разыскать его на медицинской палубе.

languages.text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.
languages.original_text: Нужно пройти осмотр в Сектор Бионика — отсеке, где врачуют и аугментируют элиту корабля. Осмотр проводят двое специалистов, возглавляющих отсек.

traits.locale_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. The compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

languages.text: Melde dich in Sektor Bionica zu einer Viabilitätseinschätzung. Dieses Modul ist der Instandhaltung und Augmentation der Schiffseliten vorbehalten. Die Prozedur wird von den beiden Dienst habenden Spezialisten durchgeführt.
languages.original_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

traits.locale_text: Melde dich in Sektor Bionica zu einer Viabilitätseinschätzung. Dieses Modul ist der Instandhaltung und Augmentation der Schiffseliten vorbehalten. Die Prozedur wird von den beiden Dienst habenden Spezialisten durchgeführt.

languages.text: Rendez-vous dans le secteur Bionica pour vous soumettre à une évaluation de viabilité. Ce compartiment est consacré à l'administration des soins et des augmentations de l'élite du vaisseau. La procédure sera dirigée par deux spécialistes.
languages.original_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

traits.locale_text: Rendez-vous dans le secteur Bionica pour vous soumettre à une évaluation de viabilité. Ce compartiment est consacré à l'administration des soins et des augmentations de l'élite du vaisseau. La procédure sera dirigée par deux spécialistes.

languages.text: 前往仿生区接受生存能力评估。这个舱室专门用于舰船上精英人员的修复和植入物安装。整个流程将由两位主管专家负责。
languages.original_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

traits.locale_text: 前往仿生区接受生存能力评估。这个舱室专门用于舰船上精英人员的修复和植入物安装。整个流程将由两位主管专家负责。

languages.text: Visita el Sector Bionica para una evaluación de viabilidad. Este compartimento está reservado para el tratamiento y el aumento de la élite de la nave. Los dos especialistas a cargo dirigirán el proceso.
languages.original_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

traits.locale_text: Visita el Sector Bionica para una evaluación de viabilidad. Este compartimento está reservado para el tratamiento y el aumento de la élite de la nave. Los dos especialistas a cargo dirigirán el proceso.

languages.text: "セクター・バイオニカ "で 生存能力評価だこの区画は、船のエリートの修理と増強のために確保されている。処置は2人の専門家が担当する。
languages.original_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

languages.text: Bir yaşayabilirlik değerlendirmesi için Sektör Biyonika'ya git. Bu bölüm, geminin seçkinlerinin iyileştirilmesi ve ogmentasyonuna ayrılmıştır. Prosedür, görevli iki uzman tarafından yürütülecek.
languages.original_text: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.

traits.locale_text: Bir yaşayabilirlik değerlendirmesi için Sektör Biyonika'ya git. Bu bölüm, geminin seçkinlerinin iyileştirilmesi ve ogmentasyonuna ayrılmıştır. Prosedür, görevli iki uzman tarafından yürütülecek.
